failures.description: The agent incorrectly interpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result. The returned item explicitly had deck material set to plastic, so the correct answer should have been yes.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to determine whether item 2177997696 has deck material=plastic. The tool result at index 3 clearly shows options.deck material = "plastic" for that item. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer "No, it does not," which directly contradicts the relevant tool output. This is not an invalid tool call, unsupported intent, or underspecification; the needed evidence was available and was misread.
